query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS offering_approvals (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  offeringId INT NOT NULL,
  approvalStage ENUM('initial_review', 'financial_review', 'legal_review', 'compliance_review', 'executive_approval') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'changes_requested') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  assignedTo INT,
  reviewedBy INT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  comments TEXT,
  changesRequested TEXT,
  approvalNotes TEXT,
  rejectionReason TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (offeringId) REFERENCES offerings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (assignedTo) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (reviewedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX offering_id_idx (offeringId),
  INDEX status_idx (status),
  INDEX assigned_to_idx (assignedTo),
  INDEX approval_stage_idx (approvalStage)
);

  offeringId INT NOT NULL,
  approvalStage ENUM('initial_review', 'financial_review', 'legal_review', 'compliance_review', 'executive_approval') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected', 'changes_requested') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  assignedTo INT,
  reviewedBy INT,
  reviewedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  comments TEXT,
  changesRequested TEXT,
  approvalNotes TEXT,
  rejectionReason TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  FOREIGN KEY (offeringId) REFERENCES offerings(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (assignedTo) REFERENCES users(id),
  FOREIGN KEY (reviewedBy) REFERENCES users(id),
  INDEX offering_id_idx (offeringId),
  INDEX status_idx (status),
  INDEX assigned_to_idx (assignedTo),
  INDEX approval_stage_idx (approvalStage)
);
